text: Kiriko plays well when alongside flanking characters, such as Tracer and Genji . [ 8 ] Protection Suzu works a lot like Zarya's bubble or Baptiste's immortality field (though it lasts a mere 0.85 seconds). When timed right, it can save teammates (or yourself) from ultimates or burst damage. A combo of Swift Step + Protection Suzu allows you to save the lives of distant low health players and gives you a little time to start healing them. Swift Step provides a brief invulnerability upon arriving. With the right timing, you can dodge the effects of most abilities even if your only ally is also in range of that effect.
